# konnect_portal_ip_allow_list (Resource)

PortalIPAllowList Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_portal_ip_allow_list" "my_portalipallowlist" {
  allowed_ips = [
    "192.168.1.1",
    "192.168.1.0/22",
  ]
  portal_id = "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allowed_ips` (List of String) The list of allowed ips for the portal.
- `portal_id` (String) The Portal identifier

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ID of the allow list.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_portal_ip_allow_list.my_konnect_portal_ip_allow_list
  id = jsonencode({
    id        = "..."
    portal_id = "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_portal_ip_allow_list.my_konnect_portal_ip_allow_list '{"id": "...", "portal_id": "f32d905a-ed33-46a3-a093-d8f536af9a8a"}'
```
